<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

final class CartLoader
{
    public function load(): Cart
    {
        $payload = $_COOKIE['cart'] ?? '';
        return unserialize($payload);
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

final class CartLoader
{
    public function load(): Cart
    {
        $payload = $_COOKIE['cart'] ?? '{}';
        $data = json_decode($payload, associative: true, flags: JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR);
        return Cart::fromArray($data);
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

final class Loader
{
    public function read(string $blob): array
    {
        return unserialize($blob, ['allowed_classes' => false]);
    }
}
